hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(env|key|pem|p12|credentials)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Attempting to edit sensitive file' && exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|html|md)$' && command -v npx &>/dev/null; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
